---
anchor-sections: false
---
::: page-content

# <span style="color:#2F0407; display:block; text-align:center;">Contact</span>

<p style="text-align:center;">
**I am always open to connect and collaborate!**
</p>

📧 **Email**: pstroud\@msm.edu \| paris.stroud\@gmail.com\
🔗 <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/parissstroud" target="blank">LinkedIn</a> 

:::
